segments.text: The word that came to Jeremiah from Yahweh, saying,
Yahweh, the God of Israel, says, ‘Write all the words that I have spoken to you in a book.
segments.speaker: The LORD God of Israel

segments.text: For, behold, the days come,’ says Yahweh, ‘that I will reverse the captivity of my people Israel and Judah,’ says Yahweh. ‘I will cause them to return to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they will possess it.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: These are the words that Yahweh spoke concerning Israel and concerning Judah.
For Yahweh says:
We have heard a voice of trembling; a voice of fear, and not of peace.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Ask now, and see whether a man travails with child. Why do I see every man with his hands on his waist, as a woman in travail, 
and all faces are turned pale?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Alas, for that day is great, so that none is like it! It is even the time of Jacob’s trouble; 
but he will be saved out of it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
It will come to pass in that day, says Yahweh of Armies, that I will break his yoke from off your neck, and will burst your bonds. 
Strangers will no more make them their bondservants;
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text:
but they will serve Yahweh their God, and David their king, 
whom I will raise up to them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Therefore don’t be afraid, O Jacob my servant, says Yahweh. Don’t be dismayed, Israel. For, behold, I will save you from afar, and save your offspring from the land of their captivity. Jacob will return, and will be quiet and at ease. 
No one will make him afraid.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
For I am with you, says Yahweh, to save you; for I will make a full end of all the nations where I have scattered you, 
but I will not make a full end of you; but I will correct you in measure, and will in no way leave you unpunished.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For Yahweh says,
Your hurt is incurable. Your wound is grievous.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
There is no one to plead your cause, that you may be bound up. 
You have no healing medicines.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: All your lovers have forgotten you. They don’t seek you. For I have wounded you with the wound of an enemy, with the chastisement of a cruel one, for the greatness of your iniquity, because your sins were increased.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Why do you cry over your injury? Your pain is incurable. For the greatness of your iniquity, because your sins have increased, 
I have done these things to you.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore all those who devour you will be devoured. All your adversaries, everyone of them, will go into captivity. Those who plunder you will be plunder. I will make all who prey on you become prey.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: For I will restore health to you, and I will heal you of your wounds,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh,
because they have called you an outcast, saying, ‘It is Zion, whom no man seeks after.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Yahweh says:
Behold, I will reverse the captivity of Jacob’s tents, and have compassion on his dwelling places. The city will be built on its own hill, and the palace will be inhabited in its own place.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Thanksgiving will proceed out of themwith the voice of those who make merry. I will multiply them, and they will not be few; I will also glorify them, and they will not be small.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Their children also will be as before, and their congregation will be established before me. 
I will punish all who oppress them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Their prince will be one of them, and their ruler will proceed from among them. I will cause him to draw near, and he will approach me; 
for who is he who has had boldness to approach me?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says Yahweh.
You shall be my people, and I will be your God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Behold, Yahweh’s storm, his wrath, has gone out, a sweeping storm; 
it will burst on the head of the wicked.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
The fierce anger of Yahweh will not return until he has accomplished, and until he has performed the intentions of his heart. 
In the latter days you will understand it.
segments.speaker: The LORD
